name: ClawGuard
description: OpenClaw runtime security middleware: deny-by-default policy enforcement, shell/file/network protection, YAML policy config, human-in-the-loop approvals for sensitive ops, JSONL audit trail. Protects ~/.ssh, ~/.aws, .env. Available as npm package and Python SDK.
conditions: Add YAML frontmatter to openclaw-skill/skill.md (name, description, version, author, triggers)
Add or rename SKILL.md to repo root
Add skill wiring docs: how clawguard_check_shell() integrates into OpenClaw tool calls
review: Outstanding security product filling a critical ecosystem gap. Multi-layer (shell+file+network) with YAML policy and human-in-the-loop is genuinely novel. Potential to become infrastructure-level tooling. Published conditionally — requires YAML frontmatter + skill wiring docs.
